summary: Turn 13 (claude): ported HATEOAS service-worker demo (demo/hateoas/). Verified compatible (no jst-model/el.emit; uses templateObserver auto-register) and validated LIVE in a browser over http: feed-item registered over the wire, 3 cards rendered, 0 steady-state console errors. Next: codex dev-overlay/JST.configure parity (step 13); claude takes docs reconcile (step 16).
